content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help! How should I follow up if I don’t hear back?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你的帮助了！如果没回音我该怎么跟进？
expectedAnswers: I’ll send a polite email after five days if I haven’t heard anything.
Could you let me know the best way to check on the status?
I’ll wait a few days and then reach out gently—thanks for your guidance!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了跟进方式
语言准确性：语法正确，用词得体
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'follow up', 'polite', 'reminder', 'status' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve sent the form—how do I know if it was processed?
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经提交了表格，我怎么知道它是否被处理了？
expectedAnswers: Can you let me know how I can check the status online?
Will I get an email confirmation once it’s processed?
If I don’t hear back in a week, should I email you again?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰询问确认流程
语言准确性：使用了正确句型如 'Can you let me know...', 'Will I get...' 等
表达自然度：语气礼貌、不催促，符合英语沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'status', 'processed', 'confirmation', 'email' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’ll send you the updated CV by tomorrow. What’s the best way to send it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我明天把更新后的简历发给你，最好怎么发送？
expectedAnswers: Please email it to me at j.smith@univ.edu—I’ll forward it to the committee.
You can upload it to the applicant portal under 'Documents'.
Either way is fine, but email is quicker if it’s urgent.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提供了接收方式或建议
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了 'email', 'upload', 'portal' 等准确词汇
表达自然度：表达清晰、有礼貌、符合学术场景
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'email', 'upload', 'portal', 'forward' 等场景关键词
